sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10555" key="a)ntisunanta/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισυν-αντάω</orth>, <sense id="n10555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meet face to face,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.227</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
